ir_specs.statement: By default, cp copies the contents of special files only when not copying recursively.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: By default, cp copies the contents of special files only when not copying recursively.

ir_specs.statement: This default can be overridden with the --copy-contents option.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: This default can be overridden with the --copy-contents option.

ir_specs.statement: This is useful when you simply want to make a backup of an existing file before changing it.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: This is useful when you simply want to make a backup of an existing file before changing it.

ir_specs.statement: The program accepts the following options.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The program accepts the following options.

ir_specs.statement: Preserve as much as possible of the structure and attributes of the original files in the copy (but do not attempt to preserve internal directory structure; i.e., ‘ ls -U ’ may list the entries in a copied directory in a different order).
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Preserve as much as possible of the structure and attributes of the original files in the copy (but do not attempt to preserve internal directory structure; i.e., ‘ ls -U ’ may list the entries in a copied directory in a different order).

ir_specs.statement: Equivalent to -dR --preserve=all with the reduced diagnostics.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Equivalent to -dR --preserve=all with the reduced diagnostics.

ir_specs.statement: Copy only the specified attributes of the source file to the destination.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Copy only the specified attributes of the source file to the destination.

ir_specs.statement: If the destination already exists, do not alter its contents.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: If the destination already exists, do not alter its contents.

ir_specs.statement: See the --preserve option for controlling which attributes to copy.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: See the --preserve option for controlling which attributes to copy.

ir_specs.statement: Make a backup of each file that would otherwise be overwritten or removed.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Make a backup of each file that would otherwise be overwritten or removed.

ir_specs.statement: One useful application of this combination of options is this tiny Bourne shell script:.

ir_specs.statement: If copying recursively, copy the contents of any special files (e.g., FIFOs and device files) as if they were regular files.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: If copying recursively, copy the contents of any special files (e.g., FIFOs and device files) as if they were regular files.

ir_specs.statement: This means trying to read the data in each source file and writing it to the destination.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: This means trying to read the data in each source file and writing it to the destination.

ir_specs.statement: It is usually a mistake to use this option, as it normally has undesirable effects on special files like FIFOs and the ones typically found in the /dev directory.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: It is usually a mistake to use this option, as it normally has undesirable effects on special files like FIFOs and the ones typically found in the /dev directory.

ir_specs.statement: This option has no effect unless copying recursively, and it does not affect the copying of symbolic links.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: This option has no effect unless copying recursively, and it does not affect the copying of symbolic links.
